title: The Night Market at the End of the World
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A smuggler of illegal magical artifacts discovers that the floating night market where she trades exists in a different timeline every sunset, and someone is hunting vendors across all of them to collapse the market into a single doomed reality.
long_description: A smuggler of illegal magical artifacts discovers that the floating night market where she trades exists in a different timeline every sunset, and someone is hunting vendors across all of them to collapse the market into a single doomed reality.
